title: Marketing Specialist
raw_jd: Execute lifecycle and demand generation campaigns for a B2B software company. Build email campaigns, coordinate webinars, maintain campaign calendars, report on conversion metrics, and collaborate with sales on follow-up. Experience with marketing automation and clear copywriting is important.
expected_must_haves: Marketing automation or email platform experience
expected_disqualifiers: No evidence of hands-on campaign execution
scoring_notes: Strong candidates show shipped campaigns, tool fluency, and practical reporting habits.
